body.text: What I love about the industry is all the great people I have worked with over the years, and ICE has always been the best show for catching up with all my various ex-colleagues, and talking about the diverse and exciting new things they're working on.
I was totally blown away by the size and buzz at the show - I had been sceptical but the move to Barcelona has breathed new life into it.
Thank you to everyone I spoke to and I hope you got as much out of it as I did.
Very excited to attend ICE 2026 in Barcelona on January 20 at Fira Gran Via Barcelona.
